name: react-router-7/framework
notes: Canonical React Router 7 (framework mode) Ring 1 scenario. Init lives in app/entry.client.tsx per the skill's EXAMPLE.md. Uses Vite under the hood — env var is VITE_PUBLIC_AMPLITUDE_API_KEY (VITE_ prefix). SDK family defaults from FRAMEWORK_TO_SDK; no override needed. The scorer's init-call-present regex requires `import { init }` + `init(`, so the golden uses the named-import shape rather than `initAll` from a namespace import.
